mapper.sql: select c.*, u.nickname as user_nickname, u.avatar as user_avatar, u.badge as user_badge, u.website as user_website, u.role as user_role, u.deleted_at as user_deleted_at, pu.id as reply_user_id, pu.nickname as reply_user_nickname, pu.avatar as reply_user_avatar, pu.badge as reply_user_badge, pu.website as reply_user_website, pu.role as reply_user_role, pu.deleted_at as reply_user_deleted_at, pc.nickname as reply_user_fallback_nickname, coalesce(c.root_id, c.parent_id) as reply_root_id from comments c left join users u on u.id = c.user_id left join comments pc on pc.id = c.parent_id left join users pu on pu.id = pc.user_id
mapper.select: select count(*) from comments c where c.status = 1 and c.parent_id is not null and (c.root_id = #{rootId} or c.parent_id = #{rootId})
where c.status = 1 and c.parent_id is not null and (c.root_id = #{rootId} or c.parent_id = #{rootId}) order by c.created_at asc, c.id asc limit #{limit} offset #{offset}

select count(*) from comments c where c.target_type = #{targetType} and c.target_key = #{targetKey} and c.status = 1 and c.parent_id is null and (c.created_at > #{createdAt} or (c.created_at = #{createdAt} and c.id > #{id}))

select count(*) from comments c where c.status = 1 and c.parent_id is not null and (c.root_id = #{rootId} or c.parent_id = #{rootId}) and (c.created_at < #{createdAt} or (c.created_at = #{createdAt} and c.id < #{id}))
mapper.insert: insert into comments (target_type, target_key, parent_id, root_id, content, nickname, email, website, avatar, user_id) values (#{targetType}, #{targetKey}, #{parentId}, #{rootId}, #{content}, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{website}, #{avatar}, #{userId})
